examples: The town of Opatija was the seaside resort of the Austro-Hungarian Empire, and its architecture and well-satisfied air reflect its Mitteleuropa past.
The two met wandering as displaced persons through the chaos of postwar Mitteleuropa, where they were picked up by the Jewish Brigade.
Mr de Villepin decorated his address with erudite references to such cultural totems of Mitteleuropa as Gustav Klimt, Elias Canetti, Stefan Zweig and Mozart (whose 250th birthday it was).
